scripts.dev:images: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; docker build -t endian/platform:local -f apps/platform/Dockerfile . 2>/dev/null || echo "apps/platform/Dockerfile not found — build after sandbox agent adds it"; docker build -t endian/sandbox:local -f apps/sandbox/Dockerfile . 2>/dev/null || echo "apps/sandbox/Dockerfile not found — build after sandbox agent adds it"; kind load docker-image endian/platform:local --name "${KIND_CLUSTER_NAME:-endian}" 2>/dev/null || true; kind load docker-image endian/sandbox:local --name "${KIND_CLUSTER_NAME:-endian}" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.infra:deploy: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; TF_DIR=infra/terraform; REG=$(terraform -chdir=$TF_DIR output -raw artifact_registry_url 2>/dev/null || echo REGION-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT/endian); PROJECT=$(terraform -chdir=$TF_DIR output -raw project_id 2>/dev/null || echo PROJECT); docker build -t "$REG/endian-platform:latest" -f apps/platform/Dockerfile .; docker build -t "$REG/endian-sandbox:latest" -f apps/sandbox/Dockerfile .; gcloud auth configure-docker "${REG%%/*}" --quiet; docker push "$REG/endian-platform:latest"; docker push "$REG/endian-sandbox:latest"; gcloud container clusters get-credentials $(terraform -chdir=$TF_DIR output -raw gke_cluster_name) --zone $(terraform -chdir=$TF_DIR output -raw gke_location) --project $PROJECT; kubectl rollout restart deployment/platform -n endian-platform'
